transcription: Anwa amkan? Sennig n At Dda Yiraten, le3tab-is d tasa3unt, yeghha Sidi Yusem kan. Sennig n At Dda Yiraten i d-tbaghed asawen? Birgiz, gher le3djil. Aha! L3afid n At Dda Yiraten umi kan ay t-yamal ibaz. Umbe3d n Itayes, armi akka achal? L3afid n At Dda Yiraten umi kan ay t-yamal ibaz.

INCIDENT.description: Situation vague, lieu difficile a identifier
